_meta.description: D6 fixtures for hermes / shared-state-read-write (D5 featureType shared-state-write)

fixtures._comment: shared-state-write turn 1 — 2nd leg (post set_notes exec): matches only when THIS tool call's result is in the request (toolCallId gate). Ordered ABOVE the 1st-leg fixture so it wins once the set_notes result is present. Mirrors the green frontend-tools two-leg pattern; keyed on the specific toolCallId (not a bare hasToolResult) so a later turn's tool result can't misfire it.

match.userMessage: remember that my favorite color is blue

response.content: Got it — I have noted that your favorite color is blue.

fixtures._comment: shared-state-write turn 1 — 1st leg: emit the set_notes state-writer tool call only. The hermes adapter merges {notes} into shared-state key `notes` and emits a StateSnapshotEvent, then feeds the tool result back so the model produces the 2nd-leg text. Do NOT include content here (an assistant message with both content and tool_calls can be split into two history entries and re-match by substring).

match.userMessage: remember that my favorite color is blue

fixtures._comment: shared-state-write turn 2 — recall. The prior set_notes wrote `notes` into shared state; on turn 2 the adapter renders that state back into a read-only system message, so the agent recalls blue. No turnIndex gate: substring `favorite color` matches turn 2's question.

response.content: Your favorite color is blue — I noted it earlier.

fixtures._comment: Greet pill — shared-state-aware greeting (mirrors langgraph). Matches on userMessage only.

response.content: Hi — I'm your shared-state co-pilot. Your Preferences panel (name, tone, language, interests) is fed to me on every turn, and I jot notes back into the Agent Scratch Pad via set_notes so the UI re-renders. Try setting your name or asking me to remember something.

match.userMessage: weekend plan based on my interests

response.content: A weekend tailored to your interests panel: if you haven't picked any yet, try Cooking + Travel for a market-and-day-trip combo, or Tech + Books for a maker session and a long reading afternoon. Add interests in the Preferences panel and re-ask for a more specific plan.

fixtures._comment: Remember-something pill (from suggestions.ts) — 2nd leg gated by toolCallId.

response.content: Noted — you prefer morning meetings and you don't eat dairy. I've written those to your scratch pad.

fixtures._comment: Remember-something pill — 1st leg: set_notes with the two observations.
